description: Perform a Crossed Gauge R&R (Repeatability and Reproducibility) study using the data from /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MeasurementData.csv. Assign 'Part' as the part variable, 'Operator' as the operator variable, and 'Measurement' as the measurement variable. Ensure the analysis includes a graph of variation components. Save the completed JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/GaugeStudy.jasp.
